---
title: "Team"
---

## Principal Investigator

### Javiera Cortés, PhD

Assistant Professor  
Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile  
Faculty of Chemistry and Pharmacy / School of Pharmacy

Javiera is a pharmacist and PhD in Engineering Sciences whose work combines quantitative pharmacology, systems modeling, enzyme kinetics, and mathematical modeling to study biological and pharmacological systems. Her work focuses on integrating experimental data and computational approaches to better understand biological and pharmacological processes.

## Students and trainees

Coming soon.

## Collaborators

### Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile

- **Camilo López-Alarcón**  
  Faculty of Chemistry and Pharmacy

- **Angélica Fierro**  
  Faculty of Chemistry and Pharmacy

- **Mario Faúndez**  
  Faculty of Chemistry and Pharmacy

- **Maria Rodriguez Fernandez**  
  Institute for Biological and Medical Engineering

- **Francisco Sahli**  
  Institute for Biological and Medical Engineering

- **Pedro Saa**  
  Faculty of Engineering

### International collaborators

- **William J. Jusko**  
  State University of New York at Buffalo, USA

- **Rajat Desikan**  
  Clinical Pharmacology & Pharmacometrics Systems and Tools, Platform Sciences, GSK, UK

- **Fabian Fröhlich**  
  The Francis Crick Institute, UK

- **Ramón Hermida**  
  Universidad de Vigo, Spain
